title: The Help
reviews: Unforgettable film that stays with you
Masterfully handles difficult sensitive subject matter
Touching tribute to unsung heroic women
Perfect blend of heartache and hope
Cinema at its most impactful best
Stunning performances elevate important social themes
Emotionally rich and deeply satisfying experience
Beautifully written with tremendous emotional depth
Essential viewing for its powerful message
